MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-06-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Defendant Glydways, Inc.S Cross-Motion To Disqualify Plaintiffs Counsel
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

3 - DEFENDANT GLYDWAYS, INC Notice Of Defendant Glydways, Inc.S Cross-Motion To Disqualify Plaintiffs Counsel.

Before the court are: (1) Plaintiffs Lars Herold, Miyow PTY LTD and RL Capital PTE LTD's Application To File Under Seal Pursuant To Cal. Rule Of Court 2.551; (2) Plaintiffs' Application Pursuant To Code Provision 2031.285, and (3) Defendant Glydways, Inc.'s Cross-Motion to Disqualify Plaintiff's Counsel.

Plaintiff's rule 2.551 application, which is unopposed, is GRANTED.

On Plaintiff's application under section 2031.285 of the Code of Civil Procedure, the court finds the subject document is privileged. The court finds that Plaintiffs did not establish a waiver of the privilege. The court finds the circumstances between January and May 2023 did not establish a waiver. It appears Peter Williams disclosed the document after his service as a director and Plaintiff has not established under California law that he properly retained the document or that a former director can waive the attorney-client privilege by a post-service disclosure of the document. Plaintiff must return the specified information and any copies that may exist to Defendant and otherwise treat the information as privileged.

Defendant's cross-motion to disqualify plaintiff's counsel is denied. The cross-motion is a motion that was not properly noticed and, thus, it is not properly before the court. (See Code Civ. Proc., 1005; Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1112(a).) The court notes, though, the facts surrounding the subject document do not support disqualification.

The court adopts the judge pro tem's report and recommendation except to the extent it is inconsistent with the above discussion and rulings.

2 orders are signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
